description: Perform a reliability analysis on the Extraversion items (E1, E2, E3, E4, E5) in the BFI25 dataset, accounting for reverse-coded items identified through negative item-total correlations. Create a Computed Variable named 'Extraversion_Score' representing the mean of the five items, ensuring reverse-coded items are manually transformed for a 1-6 scale. Save the project as 'Extraversion_Scale.omv' and record the corrected Cronbach's Alpha and the 'Extraversion_Score' for the first participant in 'scale_report.txt'.
